message:
feat: add ResetTestBranch and migrate tests to shared server + branch-per-test (bd-tk8y)

Add ResetTestBranch() to testdoltbranch.go for dolt_reset --hard reusable
branches (Tim Sehn optimization). Migrate migrations_test.go to a shared
test server with branch-per-test isolation via new TestMain, eliminating 8
per-test server spawns. Migrate dolt_phantom_test.go to use the shared doctor
server from TestMain, eliminating 5 per-test server spawns. All tests add
proper cleanup for server-wide operations (CREATE/DROP DATABASE).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rig: beads
Role: polecats
